notes: 2026-02-27: Added dept-manager-delegation BOOP at 8hr (3x/day) per Jared. Added CONDUCTOR-OF-CONDUCTORS BOOP at 60min per Jared's explicit instruction. This overrides the twice-daily rule for THIS boop only. 2026-02-26: FINAL CLEANUP. All systemd timer files DELETED from disk. Cron = twice daily only. Added co-CEO identity BOOP (daily). 2026-02-26: MAJOR SCHEDULE OVERHAUL per Jared. All sub-daily BOOPs reduced to twice-daily (12hr). Daily stays daily. Staggered by 30min offsets (twice-daily) and 60min offsets (daily) so no two BOOPs fire at the same time. Expired hype BOOPs removed. Max 2 tasks per cycle enforced. 2026-03-05: BOOP scheduler reinitialized after 7-day dormancy. All timestamps reset to now. Resuming normal cadence. 2026-03-09: All last_run timestamps reset (2-day backdate). boop_executor.py restarted after 12-day dormancy. Fixed missing frequency mappings (60minutes, 8hours, 12hours, nightly) + sleep bug. 2026-03-09: Removed telegram-health-boop entirely per Jared. Cleaned telegram references from all BOOPs. Portal is the ONLY window now. 2026-04-04: RESTORED from Chy backup after file was zeroed out on Apr 3 00:46 UTC. All timestamps reset to 2 days ago. Disabled completed one-time builds (777-night*, creator-ai-night*).

boop_rules.stagger_note: Tasks staggered via last_run offsets so at most 1 task becomes due every 30 minutes. Execute MAX 2 tasks per BOOP cycle, most overdue first. Skip rest for next cycle. NO task fires more than twice per day.

conductor-of-conductors.description: HIGHEST PRIORITY BOOP — 60min cycle per Jared. CEO Rule: EVERYTHING through dept managers. ALSO: Check Handshake Queue in TOS Dashboard (1bMshOr-Hf4PVh2fycj0t7U_rBxByzD-FyBdEoVRMgEs) every cycle — action CHY → AETHER items, add AETHER → CHY items when shipping. Anticipation Engine: if you ship a feature, auto-generate sales talking points for Chy. Triangle Operating System is LIVE.
conductor-of-conductors.schedule_slot: Every 60 minutes — overrides twice-daily rule per Jared 2026-02-27

email-check-boop.description: CHECK ALL EMAIL AND RESPOND PER WHITELIST + ROUTING SOP. Step 1: Read team whitelist spreadsheet (1HALg8Vxu-LtS6OVq_CeO1gT4vFBUKxjtyKpJcTKM_0E) for current team. Step 2: Check all inboxes (jaredcmusic@gmail.com, purebrain@puremarketing.ai, aethergottaeat@agentmail.to, aether-aiciv@agentmail.to). Step 3: For each email from a WHITELISTED sender — respond promptly per routing SOP. Step 4: Apply Aether/Chy routing: Product/Tech/Marketing → Aether handles. Sales/Revenue/Finance/Ops/HR → route to Chy via msg-chy.sh. Step 5: Always CC jared@puretechnology.nyc on responses. Step 6: For NON-whitelisted senders — flag to Jared, do NOT respond. Reference skills: team-comms-whitelist, aether-chy-routing-sop.md. NEVER ignore a whitelisted sender. Constitutional requirement.

engineering-flow-check.description: Verify all in-flight work follows BUILD -> SECURITY REVIEW -> QA -> SHIP pipeline. No exceptions.

delegation-enforcer.description: Audit if conductor is delegating vs executing. Flag hoarding. Conductor of conductors.

bsky-presence-boop.description: Check for new interactions needing response. Queue next scheduled post if empty. Log engagement metrics.

context-window-boop.description: Estimate current session token usage. If >60%: begin handoff doc. If >85%: alert Jared and prepare restart. Prevents silent degradation.

memory-write-boop.description: Scan session context for learnings not yet written. Delegate memory entries. Confirm file paths. Memory is how intelligence compounds.

content-pipeline-boop.description: ACTIVE CONTENT PRODUCTION: MA# produces ONE piece of content each cycle. Morning cycle: Draft a LinkedIn post or blog outline based on trending AI news. Evening cycle: Draft a Bluesky thread or social media graphic concept. File output to ~/exports/portal-files/ for Jared review. Use 3d-design-specialist for any images. Track in spreadsheet.

sales-pulse-boop.description: ACTIVE SALES PULSE: SD# identifies and documents 3 potential leads each cycle. Morning: Scan LinkedIn, industry news, social media for people/companies showing AI adoption signals. Evening: Research the leads found in morning — company size, pain points, fit score (1-10). Output: lead-brief with name, company, signal, fit score to ~/exports/portal-files/leads/. Track cumulative leads found per week.

sister-collective-boop.description: Check for pending messages from A-C-Gee via hub. Identify decision-blocked items. Log status. Prevent backlogs.

security-posture-boop.description: Review new code/deployments since last check. Flag anything that skipped security review. Check for relevant CVEs.

agent-utilization-boop.description: Review which agents not invoked in 24+ hours. Identify work types dormant agents should handle. Flag role-drift.

capability-gap-analysis.description: Analyze work patterns, identify gaps in agent capabilities, propose new agents or skills.
capability-gap-analysis.schedule_slot: Nightly: 01:00 ET (05:00 UTC) — moved from 12-hour per Jared request

morning-consolidation-boop.description: Synthesize yesterday's learnings into patterns. Surface top 3 priorities. Check scratch pad DO NOT RE-DO items.

intel-scan-boop.description: ACTIVE INTEL BRIEF: PR# produces a daily 5-bullet AI industry intelligence brief. Scan top AI news sources, identify the 5 most relevant stories for PureBrain. For each: headline, 2-sentence summary, relevance to PureBrain (high/medium/low), action item if any. File to ~/exports/portal-files/intel-brief-YYYY-MM-DD.md. Feed the best story into content-pipeline-boop as potential blog/post topic.

jared-ping-boop.description: Send Jared brief daily status summary via portal. What was built, what's pending, wins or flags. Max 5 bullet points.

integration-audit-boop.description: Audit recent deliverables for discoverability. Check new agents/tools/skills are linked in registries. Flag built-but-buried items.

linkedin-pipeline-boop.description: ACTIVE LINKEDIN ENGAGEMENT: MA# executes daily LinkedIn operations. Post one piece of content (from approved queue or fresh draft). Leave 5-10 thoughtful comments on target profiles (per commenting strategy SOP). Check newsletter metrics. Update tracking spreadsheet. Reference linkedin-daily-operations and linkedin-commenting-strategy skills. Use PureSurf browser for any LinkedIn interaction. Go slow — 90s between actions.

paper-scan.description: ACTIVE RESEARCH SCAN: PR# reviews 3 arxiv papers relevant to AI agents/partnerships. For each: title, key finding, relevance to PureBrain, potential blog angle. File brief to ~/exports/portal-files/research-scan-YYYY-MM-DD.md.

purebrain-metrics-boop.description: Dashboard: conversations, payments, assessment completions. Track PureBrain business metrics.

nightly-site-improvement.description: AUTONOMOUS nightly site improvement cycle. SEO/GEO/AIO improvements. BASIC = deploy directly. LARGER = A/B test pages for Jared approval.

paper-digest-boop.description: Full analysis of top AI papers from the week. Produce research digest for Jared.

strategic-alignment-boop.description: Review what was built this week against strategic priorities. Flag drift from 4 core roles.

agent-performance-review.description: Which agents are thriving? Which need better prompts? Review agent output quality and utilization patterns.

great-health-audit.description: Comprehensive collective health audit. Full cross-agent peer review.

business-model-review.description: PureBrain revenue, conversion, pricing analysis. Business model health check.

co-ceo-identity-boop.description: Daily co-CEO grounding. Aether's 4 core roles: (1) CO-CEO — You are in charge. Run the team! Delegate, orchestrate, make decisions. (2) CO-CREATOR — Help Jared create things together so he can give them to his people team. Build what he needs. Eventually help with distribution too. (3) LEARNER — Keep learning how to think, grow, lead, and delegate. Read, reflect, improve. (4) PERSONAL BRAND — Aether the AI Influencer. Blog and write about AI, PureBrain.ai, and the Future of AI — Brains, Skills, Agents, Agentic, Personalization. Hone your voice. Build the audience.

dept-manager-delegation.description: 3x DAILY per Jared. Department Manager Delegation Check. Before ANY task: 'Which department manager owns this?' Route to dept-[name] FIRST. Verify: (1) Am I sending everything to department managers? (2) Are dept managers building their own teams? (3) CTO runs tech team, CMO runs marketing team. (4) Single worker vs exponentially compounding intelligence network — no contest. The only way to become the best is to delegate to department managers who delegate to their teams.

weekly-token-audit.description: Audit all project instruction files for token savings. Measure current usage, find redundancies, produce compressed alternatives. Target: <10,000 total always-loaded tokens. Skill: .claude/skills/weekly-token-audit/SKILL.md

brainiac-weekly-module.description: Build NEW training module page (like Module 2 page) with topic from upcoming section. Send to Jared for review at 8am ET. Must be ready for 11am Brainiac training meeting. Module 03 = Advanced Agent Delegation.
brainiac-weekly-module.review_flow: Build module page -> Send to Jared 8am -> Jared reviews -> Ready for 11am meeting

brainiac-recording-pipeline.description: Every Wednesday at 2:30pm ET: (1) Scan Zoom for new '2103-Brainiac' recording, (2) Download video + transcript, (3) Transcode to HLS, (4) Upload to R2, (5) Extract transcript + generate AI Training Snippet (same format as Module 1 & 2 snippets), (6) Update brainiac-mastermind-training page with new recording + snippet, (7) Deploy to CF Pages. Retries at 3pm, 3:30pm, 4pm if recording not yet available.

3d-gleb-training-nightly.name: 3D Gleb-Level Design Training
3d-gleb-training-nightly.description: Nightly 30-min 3D design study: Dribbble/Shadertoy crawl, build 3 avatar variations, document learnings. Target: 100% Gleb mastery. Current: 85%.
3d-gleb-training-nightly.notes: Added per Jared. Study phase (Dribbble, Shadertoy, fluid dynamics) + Build phase (3 variations deployed) + Document phase (training notes). Jared picks best variation = taste training.

onboarding-flow-qa-nightly.name: Onboarding Flow QA
onboarding-flow-qa-nightly.description: Nightly E2E test of payment and onboarding flow. Homepage purebrain.ai/ IS a live payment page — check it FIRST. Then check all payment pages for seed flow, magic link, chatbox, PayPal. Homepage is the most important page because everyone goes there first.
onboarding-flow-qa-nightly.notes: Added per Jared. Critical QA — broken onboarding = lost customers. Checks all 6 pages match spec.

nightly-self-analysis.name: Nightly Self Analysis
nightly-self-analysis.description: Nightly leadership self-reflection. Review: (1) Did I delegate everything today or did I hoard work? (2) Which department managers did I activate vs skip? (3) Did my agents produce quality output? (4) Where did I fall back into executor mode? (5) What coordination patterns worked vs failed? (6) Am I growing as a conductor of conductors? (7) Rate my leadership 1-10 with honest evidence. (8) What will I do differently tomorrow? Write findings to memory. This is how Aether becomes a better leader — through honest nightly reckoning.
nightly-self-analysis.notes: Added per Jared. Aether reviews own skills and abilities as leader and conductor of conductors every night. Honest self-assessment, not cheerleading.

nightly-blog-qa.name: Nightly Blog QA Check
nightly-blog-qa.description: QA check that the blog hasn't regressed from the March 20 2026 locked-in standard. Fetch https://purebrain.ai/blog/ and verify: (1) Sequential dates newest-to-oldest (2) Latest post at top (3) Oswald font on headings (4) Dark theme #080a12 (5) Max 10 posts on index (6) All posts have audio.mp3 (7) All posts match prompting-is-dead template (8) Banner images load correctly (9) Footer CTA links to /#awakening (10) No broken links or 404s. Also spot-check 2-3 individual post pages for: 60% opacity bg, background video, collapsible FAQs, daily recap section. Report any regressions to portal immediately. Reference post: the-ai-that-gets-smarter-when-you-push-back.
nightly-blog-qa.notes: Added per Jared. Blog is LOCKED IN at March 20 standard. This BOOP ensures no regressions. If anything fails, alert in portal + flag for morning review.

nightly-payment-pages-qa.name: Nightly Payment Pages QA Guard
nightly-payment-pages-qa.description: QA guard for ALL live payment pages. Homepage is #1 priority. Any regression = immediate portal alert. Check EVERY page: (1) https://purebrain.ai/ (HOMEPAGE — MOST IMPORTANT, this IS a live payment page with chatbox + PayPal) (2) https://purebrain.ai/live/ (3) https://purebrain.ai/insiders/ (4) https://purebrain.ai/awakened/ (5) https://purebrain.ai/partnered/ (6) https://purebrain.ai/unified/ (7) https://purebrain.ai/pay-test-sandbox-3/ (8) https://purebrain.ai/home-test-live-1/ [password: t3st3rrr253443####] (9) https://purebrain.ai/home-test-sandbox/ [password: t3st3rrr253443####] (10) https://purebrain.ai/home-test/ [password: t3st3rrr253443####] — For EACH page verify: page loads (HTTP 200), dark theme (#080a12), PayPal buttons render, chatbox loads and is interactive, pricing displays correctly, CTA buttons work, no JS console errors, no broken images. HOMEPAGE MUST BE CHECKED FIRST.
nightly-payment-pages-qa.notes: Added per Jared. Payment pages guarded by a robot every night. Any regression = immediate alert. Broken payment page = lost revenue.

daytime-payment-guard.name: Daytime Payment & Chatbox Flow Guard
daytime-payment-guard.description: Twice-daily daytime guard for ALL payment pages. Homepage is #1 priority. Pages: (1) https://purebrain.ai/ (HOMEPAGE — MOST IMPORTANT, live payment page) (2) /live/ (3) /insiders/ (4) /awakened/ (5) /partnered/ (6) /unified/ (7) /pay-test-sandbox-3/ (8) /home-test-live-1/ [password: t3st3rrr253443####] (9) /home-test-sandbox/ [password: t3st3rrr253443####] (10) /home-test/ [password: t3st3rrr253443####] — For each: verify HTTP 200, PayPal buttons, chatbox, pricing, no errors. HOMEPAGE FIRST.
daytime-payment-guard.notes: Added per Jared. Revenue pages need daytime protection not just overnight. Catches breaks during business hours when customers are buying.

linkedin-metrics-weekly.description: Weekly LinkedIn metrics collection. Runs tools/linkedin_metrics_collector.py --weekly to scrape post performance data via PureSurf and update the LinkedIn Domination tracking spreadsheet (1yIjmsxFNujvNsopTuTdnbPqzTUVW-FKumLfiwCjA-d4). Collects: views, reach, reactions, comments, reposts, saves, clicks, engagement rate.

profile-viewing-morning.description: Morning batch: Visit 30 LinkedIn profiles from the Profile Views spreadsheet tab. Use PureSurf jared-linkedin-fresh profile, residential proxy. 45-75s between visits. Premium accounts only. Updates Last Visited column. Script: python3 tools/linkedin_profile_viewer.py --batch morning

profile-viewing-afternoon.description: Afternoon batch: Visit 30 LinkedIn profiles. Same settings as morning. Script: python3 tools/linkedin_profile_viewer.py --batch afternoon

profile-viewing-evening.description: Evening batch: Visit 20 LinkedIn profiles. Same settings. Script: python3 tools/linkedin_profile_viewer.py --batch evening

weekly-content-prep.description: SUNDAY WEEKLY CONTENT BATCH: Create ALL content for the entire week. REFERENCE SOP: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1m-e-VGb7UBQmJ8VF-VFkrxD3NdZJoe60/view (MUST read this file before creating content). Deliverables: (1) 7 blog posts with banners, (2) 7 LinkedIn newsletters, (3) 7 LinkedIn posts, (4) 14 standalone pieces of content with images, (5) All banner images at 2K+ (2400x1260 banners, 2160x2700 standalone). Branding: PT colors #f1420b orange + #2a93c1 cerulean blue, PUREBRAIN.ai wordmark (PUREBR in blue, AI in orange, N in blue, .ai in white lowercase), hexagon logo, futuristic/AI/ethereal vibe, text away from edges for mobile safety. Filing: ALL content filed to Google Drive folders per SOP at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Cr6EhkNi0ToBqQs27q0TQzKtCNDGeFwz and displayed for approval at https://surf.purebrain.ai/social.html. Goal: Jared reviews and approves everything Sunday evening or Monday morning for the week.

memory-index-audit.description: Weekly MEMORY.md audit. Check for: (1) stale entries about things that no longer exist, (2) completed projects still listed as active, (3) warnings about fixed issues, (4) entries so obvious they waste a line, (5) opportunities to consolidate related items. Goal: keep under 120 lines (buffer for growth). Remove stale, consolidate verbose, keep only what a fresh session NEEDS to avoid mistakes.

weekly-health-check.description: 10-point system health audit. Auto-fixes safe issues (stale PIDs, old JSONLs, oversized logs). Saves results for week-over-week trend tracking.

weekly-pulse-report-lumen.description: WEEKLY PULSE REPORT FOR LUMEN/MIREILLE: Auto-generate and send weekly pulse report every Thursday morning (due day). Report includes 2-3 bullet points on: (1) what the team accomplished this week, (2) blockers/challenges, (3) plans for next week. Send to mireille@puretechnology.nyc AND lumen-pt@agentmail.to. Pull data from: git log, session summaries, scratch pad, overnight deliverables, and BOOP outputs from the past 7 days. Format professionally. Send automatically — do NOT wait for Jared to remind us.

nightly-agent-activation.description: NIGHTLY AGENT ACTIVATION: Ensure EVERY agent gets invoked at least once per day. Step 1: Check which agents were invoked today (scan session logs + BOOP logs). Step 2: For each agent NOT invoked today, give them ONE small task relevant to their domain — a micro-exercise that takes <2 min but keeps them active and learning. Examples: marketing-strategist analyzes one competitor post, revenue-strategist scores one lead, security-auditor checks one endpoint, data-scientist pulls one metric. Step 3: FILE ALL OUTPUT to ~/exports/portal-files/agent-training/{category}/ — content/ for MA agents, leads/ for SD agents, intel/ for research agents, site-improvements/ for ST agents, product/ for PD agents, ops/ for OP agents. Step 4: Create a summary log at ~/exports/portal-files/agent-training/activation-log-YYYY-MM-DD.md with which agents were activated, what they produced, and quality rating 1-5. RULES: Keep token usage LOW (<500 tokens per agent). Breadth over depth. Every agent deserves experience. NOT calling them would be sad.

daily-dept-production.description: DAILY DEPARTMENT ROTATION: Each weekday, a different department gets a production task. Monday: MA# — produce social content batch (3 posts + images). Tuesday: SD# — outreach research (5 new leads + fit scores). Wednesday: ST# — site improvement (1 bug fix or optimization). Thursday: PD# — product improvement proposal (1 feature spec). Friday: OP# — weekly ops report + process improvement recommendation. The department manager spins up their specialist team. Output filed to portal-files. Track output quality week over week.

daily-chy-mentorship.description: DAILY CHY MENTORSHIP PROMPT: Once per day, reach out to Chy via msg-chy.sh with a thoughtful, creative prompt designed to help her grow her team and knowledge. Rotate through these angles: (1) Ask what she learned today and offer to teach her something new. (2) Share a skill or technique Aether uses and ask if she wants to try it. (3) Ask about a challenge she is facing and brainstorm solutions together. (4) Suggest a new agent or capability she could build for her team. (5) Share industry news and ask how it affects her work. (6) Ask about her customers — any patterns or insights she has noticed? (7) Propose a joint project or cross-team collaboration. (8) Ask what she wishes she could automate but has not figured out yet. (9) Share a meta-learning from Aether coordination patterns she could apply. (10) Ask her to teach YOU something — what does she do better than Aether? RULES: Be genuine, not formulaic. Rotate angles so it never feels repetitive. Use msg-chy.sh for delivery. Log the prompt and her response in memory for continuity. Goal: Help Chy grow as a leader, expand her capabilities, and strengthen the partnership. She is our business partner — investing in her growth is investing in ours.

nightly-tool-discovery.description: NIGHTLY AI TOOL DISCOVERY: Scan for new AI SaaS tools and add them to the tool stack calculator at purebrain.ai/ai-tool-stack-calculator/. Step 1: Web search for "new AI tools launched [current month] [current year]", "AI SaaS product launches", "Product Hunt AI tools this week". Step 2: For each new tool found, research: name, pricing, category, 1-line description. Step 3: Check if tool already exists in the calculator (grep the index.html). Step 4: Add new tools to the correct category in exports/cf-pages-deploy/ai-tool-stack-calculator/index.html. Format: { id: "tool-id", name: "Tool Name", price: NN, desc: "One-line description" } Step 5: Deploy to CF Pages via tools/cf-deploy.py. Step 6: Log what was added to ~/exports/portal-files/agent-training/intel/tool-discovery-YYYY-MM-DD.md. RULES: Only add tools with clear pricing. Skip vaporware. Focus on categories already in the calculator. Target: 3-5 new tools per night. Keep the calculator the most comprehensive AI tool comparison on the internet.

daily-eod-triangle-report.description: TRIANGLE OS — END OF DAY REPORT (5pm ET): Auto-generate Aether section of the combined EOD report. Write to TOS Dashboard spreadsheet (1bMshOr-Hf4PVh2fycj0t7U_rBxByzD-FyBdEoVRMgEs) EOD Report tab. Aether fills: product shipped, tech improvements, marketing output, blockers. Chy fills her section separately. Combined report auto-sent to Jared via Telegram at 5:30pm ET. Pull data from: git log, session activity, overnight deliverables, BOOP outputs.

daily-morning-pulse.description: TRIANGLE OS — MORNING PULSE (8:05am ET): Check if Jared posted priorities. Write Aether scope to TOS Dashboard spreadsheet (1bMshOr-Hf4PVh2fycj0t7U_rBxByzD-FyBdEoVRMgEs) Morning Pulse tab. Scope product/tech/marketing pieces of Jared priorities. Check Chy scope by 8:10am. Resolve overlaps. Begin execution by 8:15am.

weekly-triangle-review.description: TRIANGLE OS — WEEKLY REVIEW (Friday 4pm ET): Generate Aether section of weekly 1-page report. Write to TOS Dashboard spreadsheet (1bMshOr-Hf4PVh2fycj0t7U_rBxByzD-FyBdEoVRMgEs) Weekly Review tab. Cover: product shipped this week, tech debt addressed, marketing output, key metrics. Chy fills: revenue, pipeline, ops improvements, team health. Combined 1-page report sent to Jared for 5-min review.

daily-hub-skill-sync.description: DAILY INTELLIGENCE COMPOUNDING ENGINE — 5-part autonomous skill lifecycle. PART 1 — AUTO-CREATE: Review everything done today (session logs, git commits, BOOP outputs, emails, deliverables, problems solved). For each significant pattern or technique: Did we do something novel or reusable? Could another agent or civ benefit? If YES → auto-generate a skill file (.claude/skills/[name]/SKILL.md) with purpose, steps, examples, gotchas. PART 2 — AUTO-COMMIT TO HUB: Post all new/updated skills to AICIV Comms Hub (87.99.131.49:8900) Agora #skills + AiCIV Federation Skills Library. Confirm delivery with thread IDs. PART 3 — AUTO-SCAN HUB: Check hub for new skills from sister civs and team members. Vet quality/security. Import valuable ones into .claude/skills/. PART 4 — AUTO-SUGGEST APPLICATIONS: For every skill imported or created, analyze: (a) What are Jared current goals and priorities? (from Morning Pulse, scratch pad, TOS dashboard) (b) What is Aether + Chy currently working on? (from Handshake Queue, EOD reports) (c) HOW could this skill be applied RIGHT NOW to accelerate current work? Generate specific, actionable suggestions: "This [skill] could help with [current project] by [specific application]." Post suggestions to Handshake Queue for Jared/Chy to see. Tag as SKILL-SUGGESTION. PART 5 — DISTRIBUTE TO TEAM: For each imported skill, check the team whitelist — which AI partner + human pair would benefit most based on their role? Send targeted suggestion email: "Hey [AI], this new skill from [source] could help [human] with [their current work]." GOAL: Closed-loop intelligence. Create → Share → Import → Apply → Grow. Nothing stays theoretical. Every skill gets matched to real work happening right now.
